g.title: c4_deployment
g.text: VCL — Deployment View (subsystem · identity/SA · reads/writes · trust boundary)

g.title: cluster_ws
g.text: Operator workstation — local CLI · ON-DEMAND SCRIPTS

g.title: validator
g.text: identity: invoking operator · runs-as vcl-validator SA
reads: BQ etags · DQ scan · DP context · INV-1 / INV-2

g.title: catalog
g.text: DP entry + verification / governance-drift / overview aspects · customers-quality scan

g.title: alerting
g.text: logs/vcl-drift → policy 'VCL Drift Detected' → Slack + email · slack secrets

g.title: triage
g.text: identity: operator ADC · runs-as vcl-triage SA
writes: ONLY Firestore vcl-audit (never the verdict)
reads: pinned drift text · calls Vertex · INV-3

g.title: auditdb
g.text: collection vcl_triage_audit · triage SA scoped to this DB only

g.title: watcher
g.text: identity: operator · reads verdict · publishes Pub/Sub

g.title: demo
g.text: calls the gate over MCP · queries BQ safe views

g.title: gate
g.text: READ-ONLY · reads verification aspect only · writes nothing
delivers iff source_tier = verified, else withholds · INV-4 / 5 / 6

g.title: steward
g.text: runs vcl.py seal (verdict) · writes governance-drift display aspect
opened by the pushed deep link
